query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `commPlanRoleOptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `label` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `stakeholderPositionOptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `label` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `externalParties` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `communication_log` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `project_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `log_date` DATE NOT NULL,
  `communication_type` VARCHAR(255),
  `subject` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  `sent_by` VARCHAR(255),
  `recipients` TEXT,
  `method` VARCHAR(100),
  `summary` TEXT,
  `linked_comm_plan_entry_id` INT,
  `attachment_url` VARCHAR(1000),
  `notes` TEXT,
  `created_by` INT,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `commPlanMethodOptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `label` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `isDefault` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  `sequence` INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `commPlanJobOptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `label` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `commPlanItems` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `entryId` INT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `description` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  `commType` ENUM('Push','Pull','Interactive','Other') DEFAULT 'Push' NOT NULL,
  `periodic` VARCHAR(100),
  `sequence` INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `communicationPlanEntries` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `stakeholderId` INT,
  `targetType` ENUM('stakeholder','role','job'),
  `targetValue` VARCHAR(300),
  `role` VARCHAR(200),
  `informationNeeded` TEXT,
  `preferredMethods` JSON,
  `frequency` VARCHAR(100),
  `textNote` TEXT,
  `escalationProcedures` TEXT,
  `acknowledgmentNeeded` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `responsible` VARCHAR(200),
  `responsibleStakeholderId` INT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `commPlanInputItems` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `entryId` INT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` INT NOT NULL,
  `description` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  `sequence` INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
